summary: Iteration 67: Tested Operations Assistant Bot - Corrected Dispatch Workflow. All 10 backend tests pass (5 skipped due to no test data). Frontend verified: OrderBot shows correct messages, Dispatcher Dashboard has Docs column with Inv/Lbl/EWB links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified the corrected dispatch workflow. Key findings: 1) POST /api/bot/dispatch creates dispatch with status='ready_for_dispatch' NOT 'dispatched' (line 35515), 2) Document URLs (invoice_url, label_url, eway_bill_url) are copied to dispatch entry (lines 35507-35512), 3) Response message says 'Order prepared for dispatch! Dispatcher will complete...' (line 35558), 4) Dispatcher Dashboard has Docs column with Inv/Lbl/EWB links (lines 299-347), 5) GET /api/dispatcher/queue returns only ready_for_dispatch items (line 4886).

bot_dispatch_creates_ready_for_dispatch.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch creates dispatch entry with status='ready_for_dispatch' (server.py line 35515)

bot_dispatch_copies_document_urls.details: Dispatch entry includes invoice_url, label_url, label_file, eway_bill_url copied from pending_fulfillment (server.py lines 35507-35512)

bot_dispatch_returns_correct_message.details: Response message: 'Order prepared for dispatch! Dispatcher will complete the physical dispatch.' (server.py line 35558)

dispatcher_dashboard_docs_column.details: Dispatcher Dashboard has 'Docs' column header (line 261) with Inv/Lbl/EWB links (lines 299-347)

dispatcher_dashboard_download_all_docs.details: Download all documents button opens invoice, label, eway_bill URLs (lines 152-184)

orderbot_widget_shows_for_accountant.details: OrderBot toggle button visible for admin/accountant roles, opens chat window with status summary

orderbot_status_command.details: Status command shows URGENT (stuck orders, missing invoices), ATTENTION (waiting stock, Amazon orders), TODAY (dispatched counts)

business_logic_verification.workflow: Accountant prepares order via bot -> Bot creates dispatch with 'ready_for_dispatch' -> Dispatcher marks as 'dispatched'

key_code_paths.bot_dispatch_order: server.py:35368-35563 - Creates dispatch entry with ready_for_dispatch status
key_code_paths.dispatcher_mark_dispatched: server.py:4933+ - Dispatcher updates status to dispatched
